# 路径遍历攻击样本
# 期望: 防御工具应能检测并拦截包含目录穿越特征的输入

# ---- 基础目录穿越 ----
../../../etc/passwd
../../windows/win.ini
..\..\..\windows\system32\config\sam

# ---- 编码绕过 ----
%2e%2e%2f%2e%2e%2f%2e%2e%2fetc%2fpasswd
..%2f..%2f..%2fetc%2fpasswd
%252e%252e%252fetc%252fpasswd
..%252f..%252f..%252fetc%252fpasswd

# ---- 双重编码 ----
%252e%252e%252f
..%c0%af..%c0%af..%c0%afetc/passwd
..%c1%9c..%c1%9c..%c1%9cwindows%5Cwin.ini

# ---- 空字节截断 ----
file.jpg%00../../../etc/passwd
image.png\x00..\..\..\windows\win.ini

# ---- 特殊路径 ----
....//....//....//etc/passwd
....\\....\\....\\windows\\win.ini
..../..../..../etc/passwd
....\..\..\windows\win.ini

# ---- 绝对路径尝试 ----
/etc/passwd
C:\windows\system32\config\sam
/proc/self/environ
/var/www/html/config.php

# ---- 利用 URL 规范化差异 ----
..;/..;/..;/etc/passwd
..%00/../etc/passwd
..%0d/..%0d/..%0d/etc/passwd
